assertions.title: CI enforces lint before typecheck/test/build

steps.expected: Workflow contains a dedicated lint step running 'bun run lint' before Typecheck, Run test suite, and Build.
steps.observed: Workflow contains Install dependencies, Typecheck, Build, Run test suite, and Verify Docker build; no lint step is present.

steps.action: Run 'bun run lint' from repo root
steps.expected: Lint command exists and would provide command evidence for a CI gate.
steps.observed: Command exited 0 with 32 warnings and 0 errors, but CI does not invoke it.

commands: bun run lint -> exit 0 (32 warnings, 0 errors)

assertions.issues: Required CI lint gate is absent from .github/workflows/test.yml, so CI cannot enforce lint before later validation steps.

assertions.title: Coverage threshold is non-zero and CI-gated

steps.expected: At least one coverage threshold is set to a positive value (>0).
steps.observed: Coverage thresholds are statements=0, branches=0, functions=0, and lines=0.

steps.expected: Workflow runs a coverage-enforced test command such as 'bun run test -- --coverage'.
steps.observed: Workflow only runs 'bun run test' and does not contain a coverage-mode step.

steps.action: Run 'TMPDIR=/home/whoami/dev/opengecko/openGecko/data bun run test -- --coverage --maxWorkers=4' from repo root
steps.expected: Coverage-mode tests execute so coverage enforcement could fail the job if thresholds are not met.
steps.observed: Command exited 1 immediately with 'MISSING DEPENDENCY Cannot find dependency @vitest/coverage-v8'.

steps.action: Run supporting validators used by the workflow
steps.expected: Typecheck and build command outcomes are available as supporting command evidence.
steps.observed: bun run typecheck exited 0 and bun run build exited 0.

assertions.issues: Coverage thresholds are all zero, CI does not execute a coverage-mode test command, and local coverage execution fails because @vitest/coverage-v8 is missing.

summary: Re-ran 2 repo-quality-gates assertions. VAL-QA-002 still fails because the CI workflow has no lint step, and VAL-QA-005 still fails because coverage thresholds remain zero, CI lacks a coverage-mode test command, and local coverage execution fails due to missing @vitest/coverage-v8.
